---
title: Support and Contact
---

You can find additional information and guides on the [GitLab website](https://support.gitlab.com/hc/en-us).

For information on version control you can visit the [Software Carpentry](https://swcarpentry.github.io/git-novice/).  

For technical support you can contact the [RDM Support Desk](mailto:rdm@vu.nl?subject=Gitlab).
